goal: Suno mujhe powerful website task automation, prompts, code aur online workflow pipeline chaiye

tasks.title: Intake Brain / Requirement Collector
tasks.purpose: Samjho user ka goal, required inputs, target websites, login needs, aur success criteria.
tasks.checkpoint: User confirms exact task, permissions, and risk level.

tasks.title: Planner Brain
tasks.purpose: Goal ko small tasks, dependencies, deadlines, aur fallback paths me todna.
tasks.checkpoint: Plan has clear steps, owner, and expected output.

tasks.title: Tool Router
tasks.purpose: Har step ke liye best tool choose karna: code, browser, API, files, email, ya manual approval.
tasks.checkpoint: Only approved tools run; secrets are loaded from environment variables.

tasks.title: Executor Chain
tasks.purpose: Local scripts, website actions, API calls, and document generation ko sequence me run karna.
tasks.checkpoint: Each action logs result and stops on unsafe/high-cost operations.

tasks.title: Verifier Brain
tasks.purpose: Output validate karna: screenshots, API response, tests, content quality, aur data accuracy.
tasks.checkpoint: Task complete only after automated checks plus human review for sensitive actions.

tasks.title: Learning Loop
tasks.purpose: Successful runs se reusable templates, prompts, aur tool recipes banana.
tasks.checkpoint: Save only non-sensitive lessons and redact private data.

secrets.storage: Use environment variables or a secret manager only.

blocked_actions: spam or mass-message people without consent
